author: Luel
text:
Happy birthday Kyra Shimboooo!!

I still remember the day we first met during freshman year, and I can't believe you're now an adult with a bachelor's degree while I'm still a student 😭
I was so sad that I wasn't able to graduate with you and that we didn't get to take our last photo together at graduation but I believe we will be able to see each other again🥹
Even abroad, whenever I see a frog, it reminds me of you and makes me feel nostalgic. I miss you wearing your little frog ring and hat.
Thank you for all the memories during our school years, and I hope you have a wonderful birthday and an amazing time celebrating. 🎁
I wish you all the best for your future! Love yaaa🥰

author: Sree
text: Happy Birthday Kyra!! Hope ur having the most amazing day ever!! I’m so glad to have met u at UofR, and I hope ur having so much fun!! Keep staying silly!! 🥳🎉
